title: microcnemum fastigiatum
intro: Microcnemum fastigiatum, also known as the tower knotgrass or tower cinquefoil, is a perennial plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Microcnemum fastigiatum has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
